heading: Hobbies
intro: Outside of engineering work, I enjoy creative activities and exploring new places.

items.name: Music and Concerts
items.description: I enjoy listening to new artists and attending concerts whenever I can.
details: I like discovering new genres and live performances

items.name: Computer Projects
items.description: I spend time coding, experimenting with tools, and building useful side projects.
details: Includes web development, automation, and hands-on PC tinkering
A favorite part is shipping small ideas quickly

items.name: Food and Travel
items.description: I love trying new restaurants, cooking, and exploring places with great culture.
details: I enjoy visiting cities with unique food scenes
Travel experiences often inspire my map and portfolio updates
